title: Michael Jackson's Music Discs!!
description: This Resource pack replaces Minecraft's Vanilla Music Discs with some of Michael Jackson's famous songs to Minecraft!
body:
# MJ Music Discs Pack

Bring the legendary sound of **Michael Jackson** into Minecraft.

This resource pack replaces vanilla **Minecraft Music Discs** with some of MJ’s most iconic songs, turning your jukebox into a true classic playlist.

## Included Songs
* Bad
* Billie Jean
* Beat It
* Don't Stop 'Til You Get Enough
* Dangerous
* Smooth Criminal
* Thriller
* Human Nature
* Earth Song

## Features

✔ Replaces multiple vanilla music discs with Michael Jackson tracks
✔ Custom in-game disc names
✔ Works across multiple Minecraft versions that support jukeboxes and music discs
✔ Simple plug-and-play resource pack

## Work in Progress

This pack is still under development. Due to Minecraft jukebox limitations, some songs may **cut off before finishing**. A future update may improve or fully resolve this.

## ![MJ's Music Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf6645b975b41d6125da437b5807920197865f91.png)

Created by **ElectroArtisan**
